description: Runtime subsystem feature flags for the Archon Prime VS Code execution environment. Controls which subsystems are active during pipeline execution. Flags are evaluated at the environment_verification phase before any subsystem is invoked.

crawler_enabled.description: Activates the crawler subsystem for filesystem traversal and artifact discovery.

repair_engine_enabled.description: Activates the repair subsystem for deterministic artifact remediation.
repair_engine_enabled.notes: Repair engine must not execute before simulation_pass is validated.

simulation_engine_enabled.description: Activates the simulation framework for dry-run execution before mutation.
simulation_engine_enabled.notes: Simulation must complete and be validated before mutation_engine_enabled subsystems may run. This flag may not be set to false.

mutation_engine_enabled.description: Permits execution of filesystem mutation operations. Gate-controlled by simulation result.
mutation_engine_enabled.notes: Mutation is blocked unless simulation_engine_enabled has produced a validated simulation report.

governance_validation_enabled.description: Activates governance consistency checking against execution envelope attributes and runtime contracts.
governance_validation_enabled.notes: Must run at both environment_verification and post-mutation validation phases.

artifact_router_enabled.description: Activates the artifact routing layer. All write operations are mediated through the router.
artifact_router_enabled.notes: This flag may not be set to false. Unmediated writes are a protocol violation.

execution_logging_enabled.description: Activates execution event logging to processing reports and runtime log files.
execution_logging_enabled.notes: Logging is required for all phases. This flag may not be set to false.

rollback_enabled.description: Activates the failure rollback protocol. Triggered on any unrecoverable execution failure.
rollback_enabled.notes: This flag may not be set to false when mutation_engine_enabled is true.

header_validation_enabled.description: Activates artifact metadata header validation against the HEADER_POLICY_REGISTRY schema.

manifest_hash_check_enabled.description: Activates SHA-256 hash verification for envelope artifact bundle members.

notes: Flags listed in immutable_flags may not be set to false under any execution configuration. Attempts to disable them must be treated as a configuration error and block execution.
